parameters.query:
=SELECT store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours
FROM public.stores
WHERE (
  {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
  AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }}
)
   OR owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}'
ORDER BY CASE
  WHEN {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 0
  WHEN owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}' THEN 1
  ELSE 2
END,
COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, COALESCE(store_id, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'store_id') AS has_store_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'brand') AS has_brand,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'updated_at') AS has_updated_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'created_at') AS has_created_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'sku') AS has_sku,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'unit') AS has_unit,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'category') AS has_category,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active;

=CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.owner_import_jobs (
  job_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  store_id BIGINT,
  chat_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL,
  parsed_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  invalid_rows_json JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  file_name TEXT,
  mime_type TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
INSERT INTO public.owner_import_jobs (
  job_id, store_id, chat_id, source_type, status, parsed_rows_json, invalid_rows_json, file_name, mime_type, created_at, updated_at
)
VALUES (
  'imp_' || EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::BIGINT || '_{{ $('Parse Inventory Request').first().json.chat_id }}',
  {{ $('Parse Inventory Request').first().json.store_id || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $('Parse Inventory Request').first().json.chat_id }}',
  '{{ $('Parse Inventory Request').first().json.source_type }}',
  'received_pending_parser',
  '[]'::jsonb,
  '[]'::jsonb,
  '{{ String($('Parse Inventory Request').first().json.media_filename || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($('Parse Inventory Request').first().json.media_mime_type || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
SELECT 'ok' AS result;

={{ (() => { const s = $('Inspect Inventory Schema').first().json || {}; const store = $('Resolve Store Context').first().json || {}; const b = (value) => value === true || value === 'true' || value === 't' || value === 1 || value === '1'; const hasStoreId = b(s.has_store_id); const hasSku = b(s.has_sku); const hasUnit = b(s.has_unit); const hasCategory = b(s.has_category); const hasBrand = b(s.has_brand); const hasIsActive = b(s.has_is_active); const cols = ["item_name", "price", "stock", hasSku ? "COALESCE(sku, '') AS sku" : "'' AS sku", hasUnit ? "COALESCE(unit, '') AS unit" : "'' AS unit", hasCategory ? "COALESCE(category, '') AS category" : "'' AS category", hasBrand ? "COALESCE(brand, '') AS brand" : "'' AS brand", hasIsActive ? "COALESCE(is_active, true) AS is_active" : "true AS is_active"]; const where = hasStoreId ? (Number(store.store_id || 0) > 0 ? "store_id = " + Number(store.store_id || 0) : '1=0') : '1=1'; return "SELECT " + cols.join(', ') + " FROM public.inventory WHERE " + where + " ORDER BY item_name ASC LIMIT 500;"; })() }}

=SELECT session_id, operation_type, status, parsed_payload_json, cleanup_summary_json, preview_rows_json
FROM public.owner_operation_sessions
WHERE chat_id = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}'
  AND operation_type IN ('inventory_draft', 'inventory_preview', 'bulk_import_review', 'bulk_import_awaiting_upload')
  AND status NOT IN ('cancelled', 'applied', 'completed', 'completed_with_issues', 'failed')
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 5;

=SELECT store_id, store_name, onboarding_step, upi_id, delivery_area, operating_hours
FROM public.stores
WHERE (
  {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0
  AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }}
)
   OR owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}'
ORDER BY CASE
  WHEN {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} > 0 AND store_id = {{ Number($('Normalize Input').first().json.store_id || 0) }} THEN 0
  WHEN owner_whatsapp_number = '{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.chat_id }}' THEN 1
  ELSE 2
END,
COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, COALESCE(store_id, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'store_id') AS has_store_id,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'brand') AS has_brand,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'updated_at') AS has_updated_at,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'created_at') AS has_created_at,

  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'unit') AS has_unit,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'category') AS has_category,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'inventory' AND column_name = 'is_active') AS has_is_active;

  NOW(), NOW()
